title: Alarm
text: The alarm rang at six. She watched the dawn decide.

title: Key
text: He found a key with no door. For days, the idea fit.

title: Trade
text: I sold my shadow at noon. By dusk, I missed the shade.

title: Orbit
text: We quarrelled quietly until the comet passed. Then the living room felt bigger.

title: Recipe
text: Grandma measured time in simmering songs. The pot remembered every verse.

title: Bridge
text: I waved at a stranger across the river. He waved back, future tense.

title: Echo
text: The cave kept my secret, returning it thinner. I took the hint.

title: Receipt
text: The receipt said 'thank you'. I kept it like proof of being.
